name: Shadowdark Statblocks

releases.author: caulfieldsbrain
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/caulfieldsbrain/shadowdark-statblocks/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

### Mobile Improvements
- Monster Browser filters are now collapsible on mobile devices
- More monsters are visible on screen while browsing
- Improved mobile usability and navigation
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: caulfieldsbrain
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/caulfieldsbrain/shadowdark-statblocks/compare/1.0.4...1.1.0

## Shadowdark Statblocks v1.1.0

### New Features
- Added optional Dice Roller integration
- Attack bonuses can now be clicked to roll directly from statblocks
- Damage rolls in attacks, spells, traits, and specials are now clickable
- Graceful fallback behavior when Dice Roller is not installed

### Improvements
- Improved live monster render refresh behavior after editing notes
- Additional rendering and interaction polish across desktop and mobile
releases.name: v1.1.0 - Dice Roller integration

releases.author: caulfieldsbrain
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/caulfieldsbrain/shadowdark-statblocks/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

## Shadowdark Statblocks v1.0.4

### Fixes
- Fixed monster tags and metadata not immediately refreshing after editing monster notes
- Improved live render refresh behavior for open monster notes
releases.name: v1.0.4

releases.author: caulfieldsbrain
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/caulfieldsbrain/shadowdark-statblocks/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

## Shadowdark Statblocks v1.0.3

### Changes
- Added link to [INSTRUCTIONS.md](INSTRUCTIONS.md)
- No functional changes
---
# Shadowdark Statblocks v1.0.3

Shadowdark Statblocks brings fast, readable Shadowdark RPG monster management to Obsidian.

Create, import, browse, edit, and embed Shadowdark monster stat blocks directly inside your vault with clean native rendering and workflow-focused tools for GMs.

## Features

- Render Shadowdark monster stat blocks directly from frontmatter
- Import monsters from clipboard or selected text
- Bulk import multiple monsters at once
- Monster browser with filtering by:
  - Name
  - Source
  - Tags
  - Maximum level
- Hover previews inside the monster browser
- Smart embed rendering with:
  - ![[Monster Name]]
  - hover popovers
- Edit existing monster notes through the import modal
- Smart default tag suggestions
- Last-used source memory
- Mobile compatible
- No external dependencies required

## Included workflows

- Create monster notes from templates
- Import monsters from PDFs or copied text
- Build searchable monster libraries
- Embed monsters into adventure/session notes
- Browse monsters without opening files

## Commands

- Insert Shadowdark monster block
- Create Shadowdark monster note
- Import Shadowdark monster from clipboard
- Import Shadowdark monster from selected text
- Import multiple Shadowdark monsters from clipboard
- Edit current Shadowdark monster
- Open monster browser

## Notes

This plugin is designed specifically for Shadowdark RPG workflows and formatting conventions.

Tested on:
- Windows
- macOS
- iOS
- Linux

Thank you to the Obsidian and Shadowdark communities for inspiration and feedback.
releases.name: v1.0.3
